understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') simultaneously. A level is won only when every goal tile is occupied by a selectable piece, and the game is won after completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game uses a cursor/player with a position. CLICK at a target position selects a selectable piece if one exists there. After selection, MOVE actions (LEFT, RIGHT, UP, DOWN) move the selected piece in that direction. Movement is blocked by walls or obstacles. If no piece is selected, MOVE actions might move the cursor? The repeated failed CLICK attempts indicate that CLICK does not move pieces; it only switches selection, and clicking on an empty space or the already-selected piece has no effect, wasting steps.
